children.content: This pre-return started with an empty BOM. Add items as they come off the truck.

Tap the button below to add items as they come off the truck. The catalog has every product available.

But 4 are short — office will review variances before rent starts.
Your counts will be reviewed by the office team. Rent doesn't start until they confirm and the truck arrives at the job site.
